description: Building category definitions with descriptions and colors for city map rendering

categories.name: Residential
categories.description: Housing buildings including apartments, condos, townhouses, and senior living facilities

categories.name: Commercial
categories.description: Retail stores, restaurants, shopping centers, and consumer-facing businesses

categories.name: Office
categories.description: Professional workspaces including office buildings, corporate headquarters, and coworking spaces

categories.name: Industrial
categories.description: Warehouses, manufacturing facilities, data centers, and storage facilities

categories.name: Infrastructure
categories.description: Essential city infrastructure including parking, transit stations, and transportation hubs

categories.name: Medical
categories.description: Healthcare facilities including hospitals, clinics, dental offices, and veterinary clinics

categories.name: Education
categories.description: Schools, colleges, daycares, and other educational institutions

categories.name: Public Services
categories.description: Government services including libraries, community centers, fire stations, and police stations

categories.name: Government
categories.description: Municipal and county government buildings including city hall and courthouses

categories.name: Hospitality
categories.description: Hotels, motels, and lodging establishments from budget to luxury

categories.name: Entertainment
categories.description: Venues for recreation and entertainment including theaters, sports arenas, and nightclubs

categories.name: Religious
categories.description: Places of worship including churches, mosques, synagogues, and temples
